name: Sal's Pizza
description: Halifax's favourite slice since 1987. Hand-tossed dough, fresh local toppings, fired in a stone oven on Barrington Street.

name: Bloom & Co
description: Fresh cut flowers and arrangements sourced from Nova Scotia growers. Weddings, gifts, and everyday blooms on Quinpool Road.

name: ClearSpace Storage
description: Secure climate-controlled storage units in Dartmouth. Month-to-month, no long contracts, 24hr access.

name: The Cut
description: Barbershop on Gottingen Street. Clean fades, straight razor shaves, walk-ins welcome. Slow days mean short waits.

name: Morning Brew
description: Specialty coffee and fresh baked goods in the North End. Single origin beans, house-made pastries, good harbour views.
